zh.lifeSummary: 當Thurston de Holland III於1390年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯特維其時，他的父親Thurston de Holland II31歲，母親Agnes Eleanor Harbottle25歲。他於大約1430年與Margaret de Warrene在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1467年在威爾士凱爾納方史爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thurston de Holland III于1390年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯特維其时，他的父亲Thurston de Holland II31岁，母亲Agnes Eleanor Harbottle25岁。他于大约1430年与Margaret de Warrene在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1467年在威尔士凱爾納方史爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Dutch: genitivized form of   Holland  .

variants.name: Howland
meanings: English: variant of   Holland  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Hovland  .

History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollon
meanings: English: altered form of   Holland  .

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly East Anglia):
from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of the Latin name Augustinus ( see Augustine ). Both forms were used selectively in various regions of England as late as the 17th century and they are found occasionally much later, but the present-day use of this form as a given name is normally a reintroduction from its survival as a surname. It is particularly popular in the United States.

variants.name: Thruston
meanings: English: metathesized form of   Thurston   1.

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

en.lifeSummary: When Thurston de Holland III was born in 1390, in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thurston de Holland II, was 31 and his mother, Agnes Eleanor Harbottle, was 25. He married Margaret de Warrene about 1430, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1467, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thurston de Holland III est né en 1390, à Prestwich, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thurston de Holland II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes Eleanor Harbottle, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Warrene environ 1430, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1467, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thurston de Holland III 1390 in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thurston de Holland II 31 und seine Mutter Agnes Eleanor Harbottle 25. Er hat um 1430 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Warrene geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1467 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Caernarfonshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thurston de Holland III è nato il nel 1390 nel Prestwich, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thurston de Holland II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Eleanor Harbottle, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Warrene circa 1430, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1467, nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thurston de Holland IIIが1390年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストウィチで生まれた時，父Thurston de Holland IIは31歳，母Agnes Eleanor Harbottleは25歳であった。約1430年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでMargaret de Warreneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1467年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thurston de Holland III(이)가 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thurston de Holland II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Eleanor Harbottle(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Margaret de Warrene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1467년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thurston de Holland III nasceu em 1390, em Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thurston de Holland II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Eleanor Harbottle, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Warrene aproximadamente 1430, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1467, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thurston de Holland III родился в 1390 г. в местности прествич, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thurston de Holland II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Eleanor Harbottle, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Warrene около 1430 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1467 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thurston de Holland III nació en 1390, en Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thurston de Holland II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes Eleanor Harbottle, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret de Warrene aproximadamente 1430, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1467, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 78 años.
